description_long: This object consists of two blue chairs positioned on either side of a dark brown rectangular table, forming a compact seating arrangement. The chairs have tall, flat backs and square seats, with straight legs and no visible armrests or additional features. The table is simple, with a flat top and four straight legs, matching the color and style of the chair legs. The overall design is geometric and minimalistic, with sharp edges and a blocky appearance. There are no visible wheels, handrims, or any elements typically associated with a wheelchair or mobility aid. The object appears to be constructed from solid, hard materials, likely wood or a similar composite, and is intended for sitting and table use.
description: A minimalistic set of two blue chairs and a dark brown rectangular table, featuring straight lines and a blocky, geometric design. The set lacks any visible wheelchair features or mobility aids.
description_view_0: Front view showing the back of one blue chair directly facing the viewer, with the table and the second chair partially visible behind.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view displaying both blue chairs on either side of the dark brown table, clearly showing the seating arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to view 0, with the back of the opposite blue chair facing the viewer and the table in between.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view from the opposite side, again showing both blue chairs and the table, mirroring view 1.
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with back against the chair, arms and legs not distinctly modeled.
